non_emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Collect name, number, and issue for next business day callback

integration_constraints: Do not create or modify records in ServiceTitan
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller; identify if emergency. Emergencies (definition — confirmed fire alarm, CO alarm...): collect name, number, address → transfer to 217-555-0177; if transfer fails after 30s, assure callback within 10 min. Non-emergencies: collect name, number, issue → confirm next-business-day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Office open Monday - Friday 8 AM–6 PM Central. Greet caller, identify purpose, collect name & number. Emergencies → transfer to 217-555-0177. Non-emergencies → route to main office line. Wrap-up confirm next steps.
questions_or_unknowns: Call transfer timeout not specified — defaulting to 60s
